case_title: GREGORY SMITH VS. ERNESTO ESTENOZ et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-06-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-06-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CO-DEFENDANT PRESENT, THOUGH NOT SERVED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, GREGORY AS TO DEFENDANT ESTENOZ, ERNESTO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-05-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ESTENOZ, ERNESTO
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, GREGORY
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-02-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, GREGORY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESTENOZ, ERNESTO DOMER, DOREEN $5,270.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,355.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

ORDER (SC-108A) ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT FILED BY THE DEFENDANT (DOREEN DOMER) IS "GRANTED". JUDGMENT IS CORRECTED TO REMOVE DOREEN DOMER AS A JUDGMENT DEBTOR AND DEFENDANT. (2.) THE REQUEST FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF (GREGORY SMITH) IS "DENIED". PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,022.00 FILED BY SMITH, GREGORY AS TO DEFENDANT ESTENOZ, ERNESTO DOMER, DOREEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
